declared_scope: v0.9 parent stack plus a compressed-RAM (zram) swap device AND vm.swappiness raised from v0.9's 0 to 60. Cycle 3. The swappiness-aware successor to v0.10-zram.
hypothesis: Cycle-3 measurement showed v0.10-zram does not improve the memory-pressure channel because v0.9's swappiness=0 stops the kernel swapping to zram (both v0.9 and v0.10 throttle to the probe cap). Re-enabling swapping (swappiness=60) should let cgroup-pressure reclaim land in fast compressed RAM, cutting refault time far below v0.9's capped time. Risk: swapping model weights could regress cold-start/sustained inference; the multi-channel screen will catch any such regression.
rollback_method: Preset removes the zram device it created, then delegates to the v0.9 preset undo, which restores the original swappiness it saved; harness reverts at run end.
